collections.name: messages
indexes: CREATE INDEX idx_messages_created ON messages (created DESC)

collections.name: notifications
indexes: CREATE INDEX idx_notifications_created ON notifications (created DESC)

collections.name: reviews
indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_reviews_user_brand ON reviews (user, brand)

collections.name: categories
indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_categories_slug ON categories (slug)

collections.name: brand_settings
indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_brand_settings_key ON brand_settings (key)

collections.name: import_logs
indexes: CREATE INDEX idx_import_logs_created ON import_logs (created DESC)
